title: astragalus vaseyi var. deanei
intro: Astragalus vaseyi var. deanei, also known as Deane's milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family, native to the western United States and southwestern Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have adaptogenic and immune-boosting effects. Research suggests that Astragalus vaseyi var. deanei may have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural immune response. Astragalus vaseyi var. deanei can be prepared as an herbal supplement, often in capsule or powder form, or as a decoction or tea, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
